facade_axis_note: East facade: local x = world y (increasing northward); local y = world z (up positive, ground z=0)

scale_origin.note: local origin = SE outer corner at ground (world x=10, world y=0, z=0); local x increases northward so world y = x_local; facade spans local x 0..20 (world y 0..20), z 0..4.5
